steps.subject: Maintenance plan for your overhead doors at {company_name}
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

I'm Tal with Goldman's Garage Door Repair. We service commercial overhead doors, rollup doors, and dock equipment in {city} and the surrounding area.

I'm reaching out because most commercial doors get run hard and only serviced when they break. By then you're looking at downtime, emergency rates, and a door that's been grinding itself apart for months.

Our quarterly maintenance plans run 40-60% less than what you'd spend on emergency calls over a year. We inspect, lubricate, adjust, and replace worn parts before they become a problem.

Worth a conversation about keeping the doors at {company_name} running without surprises?

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Re: Commercial door service for {company_name}
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Following up on my note about commercial garage door maintenance for {company_name}.

Here's what our quarterly plan covers:

- Full inspection of springs, cables, tracks, and rollers
- Lubrication of all moving parts
- Opener and safety system testing
- Adjustment of spring tension and track alignment
- Written report with photos of anything that needs attention

We also do same-day commercial service when something breaks — because a door that won't open at 6 AM on a Monday can't wait until next week.

Happy to put together a quote if you can tell me how many doors you've got.

Tal
{phone}

steps.subject: Quick question about your doors at {company_name}
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

Quick question — how many overhead or rollup doors does {company_name} have at your {city} location? Just trying to get a ballpark so I can send over a rough quote.

Our commercial maintenance plans are priced per door per quarter. Most businesses with 2-4 doors end up spending less per year on maintenance than they would on a single emergency repair.

No commitment needed — just a number I can put in front of you.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Last note from Goldman's, {first_name}
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

I won't keep bugging you — I know you're running a business. Just wanted to leave my info in case you ever need commercial garage door service at {company_name}.

Same-day repairs, quarterly maintenance plans, and we know how to work on the heavy-duty commercial stuff — not just residential.

Save my number for when something comes up.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

notes: Send from MI number for MI leads, NC number for NC leads. Target warehouses, storage facilities, auto shops, dealerships, fire departments.
